content:
```mermaid flowchart TB classDef trigger fill:#e8f4ff,stroke:#1f6feb classDef pathway fill:#fff4e6,stroke:#bf6700 classDef effector fill:#d4f1d4,stroke:#1a7f37 classDef outcome fill:#e7d6ff,stroke:#6f42c1 IF[Intermittent Fasting
TRE / ADF / 5:2 / FMD]:::trigger IF --> Switch[Metabolic switch
glucose to ketones [9]]:::pathway IF --> Circadian[Circadian alignment
of energy intake [15]]:::pathway IF --> GutImmune[Gut microbiome and
innate immune signaling [19]]:::pathway IF --> Metabolome[Oscillating substrate availability
amino-acid, fat, carb metabolites [14]]:::pathway Switch --> Ketones[Ketone production
fat oxidation]:::effector Circadian --> ClockGenes[Clock gene expression
BMAL1/CLOCK alignment]:::effector GutImmune --> ILC3[Intestinal ILC3 cells
produce IL-22 [19]]:::effector ILC3 --> Beigeing[Beigeing of subcutaneous
white adipose tissue [19]]:::effector Metabolome --> Autophagy[Autophagy and circadian
rhythm modulation [14]]:::effector Metabolome --> Hormones[Ghrelin, leptin,
insulin oscillation]:::effector Ketones --> Outcome[Improved cardiometabolic
health: glycemic control, lipid
profile, weight, BP]:::outcome Beigeing --> Outcome Autophagy --> Outcome Hormones --> Outcome ClockGenes --> Outcome Refeed[Refeeding phase:
olive oil, Mediterranean
foods amplify benefit [20]]:::trigger Refeed --> Outcome ```
